/usr/bin/c++  -O3 CMakeFiles/CellEvoXTests.dir/src/core/application.cpp.o CMakeFiles/CellEvoXTests.dir/src/systems/SimulationEngine.cpp.o CMakeFiles/CellEvoXTests.dir/src/core/RunDataEngine.cpp.o CMakeFiles/CellEvoXTests.dir/src/ecs/Run.cpp.o CMakeFiles/CellEvoXTests.dir/tests/test_simulation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/CellEvoXTests.dir/tests/bench_simulation.cpp.o -o bin/CellEvoXTests  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_program_options.so.1.83.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libspdlog.so.1.12.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libtbb.so.12.11 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libpython3.12.so _deps/catch2-build/src/libCatch2Main.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libfmt.so.9.1.0 _deps/catch2-build/src/libCatch2.a
